title: 3-Piece Banana Box, 10-Piece Banana Fruit Fork, Banana Storage Box, Anti-Crush, Banana Protective Container, Portable Banana Box, Suitable for Traveling and Camping to Keep Bananas Fresh
features: Product content: You will receive 3 pieces (pink, green, yellow) plastic banana boxes and 10 pieces yellow banana-shaped fruit forks, perfect for traveling and camping.
Product material: This banana box is made of plastic, which is strong and durable, resistant to falling and extrusion, effectively preventing bananas from being squashed during transportation.

Creative design: The banana box design conforms to the shape of the banana and fits perfectly, protecting the bananas from external pressure. At the same time, the fruit fork design is interesting and increases the enjoyment of dining.
Portable and practical: This banana box is small and lightweight, easy to store in a backpack or luggage, perfect for outdoor activities or for office workers.

Multifunctional use: In addition to storing and protecting bananas, this box can also be used to store other easily squeezed foods or small objects, and the banana-shaped fruit fork is also suitable for eating a variety of fruits.
